Description: Design, build, and optimise Power Automate flows. Includes cloud flows, desktop flows, and process mining.
Notes: Most common service. Discount for retainer clients with 20+ hrs/month commitment.

Description: Strategic advisory on automation roadmap, AI adoption, and digital transformation. Includes assessment and recommendations report.
Notes: Day rate includes preparation and follow-up. Minimum 2-day engagement.

Description: Bespoke application development including web apps, APIs, integrations, and internal tools. Full SDLC.
Notes: Typically quoted as fixed-price after scoping. Hourly rate used for T&M engagements.

Description: Connect disparate systems via APIs, middleware, and data pipelines. Includes architecture design and implementation.
Notes: Often bundled with Custom Development. Complex integrations may warrant premium rate.

Description: Hands-on training sessions for Power Platform, automation best practices, and technical upskilling. Includes materials.
Notes: Half-day rate available at 60% of daily rate. Group size up to 15 participants.

Description: Review existing systems, processes, or codebases. Deliver findings report with prioritised recommendations.
Notes: Standard audit covers 2-3 days of review plus written report. Larger environments quoted separately.

Description: Reserved monthly capacity for maintenance, small changes, and ad-hoc support. Includes priority response.
Notes: Minimum 10 hrs/month. Unused hours do not roll over. 30-day cancellation notice.

Description: Urgent support outside business hours (before 8am, after 6pm, weekends, public holidays).
Notes: 2-hour minimum per callout. 1-hour response time SLA. Requires active retainer or project agreement.
